themes: Bills entering NFL offseason quiet period
writeup: The Buffalo Bills have entered the quietest stretch of the NFL calendar, with the frenzy of the draft and early free agency now firmly in the rearview mirror. As June settles in, activity around One Bills Drive slows to a measured pace ahead of training camp preparations. This period offers fans and analysts a moment to reflect on the moves made and project what the 2026 roster could look like come September. For a franchise with championship aspirations, the offseason groundwork laid in the spring will soon be tested under the summer sun of training camp.

articles.title: The Bills Have Entered the Quietest Portion of the 2026 NFL Season
